title: The Game of Noob's
body:
This mod is specifically made for noobs. DO NOT attempt to play, if you are a pro.

### Current Features

###### Blocks

-   Noob Chest

###### Weapons/Tools/Armor

-   Mud Sword
-   Mud Pickaxe
-   Mud Axe
-   Mud Shovel
-   Mud Hoe
-   Noob Sword
-   Noob Pickaxe
-   Noob Axe
-   Noob Shovel
-   Noob Hoe
-   Noob Armor (All items)
-   Dirt Armor (All Items)
-   Dirt Wood Tools
-   Noob Wood Tools

###### Foodstuffs

-   Noob Food

###### Dimensions

-   Mud Dimension

###### Igniters

-   Noob Igniter

Planned Features:
-----------------

-   Noob Village (1.14+ only)
-   Noob Ocean (1.14+ only)
-   Noob Bees (1.15+ only)
-   Noob Nether Biomes (1.16+ only)
-   Noob Minecart
-   Dirt Minecraft
-   Structures for Noob Dimensions
-   Noob Boss
-   Noob and Dirt boat
-   Noob Netherite

Known Bugs
----------

-   None

Notes
-----

-   This mod was made with MCreator (mcreator.net)
-   Suggestions and Issues will only be accepted on GitHub
-   I will not provide support for old versions of the mod. Please update to the latest version of the mod to get support.


Additional Screenshots
------------------------

Since I reached the maximum amount of pictures in the gallery, additional screenshots can be found at [https://dl.awesomekalin.eu.org/tgon-screenshots/](https://dl.awesomekalin.eu.org/tgon-screenshots/)


Thank you to my brother for helping me make the textures and thank you to MCreator/Pylo for building a high-quality mod maker.
